---
title: "Final Data Dictionary"
author: "Gopika Balasubramanian"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(knitr)

data_dict <- data.frame(
  Variable = c(
    "ID","entry_date","age","sex","bmi","socioeconomic_status",
    "smoking_status","follow_up_date","incident_COPD","copd_incident_date",
    "asthma","diabetes","hypertension","exposure_start_date",
    "exposure_end_date","state","county","total_years","coverage_flag"
  ),
  Description = c(
    "Unique patient identifier",
    "Cohort entry (index) date",
    "Age at cohort entry",
    "Biological sex of participant",
    "Body Mass Index at baseline",
    "Socioeconomic status category",
    "Smoking status (Never, Former, Current)",
    "Last known follow-up date",
    "Incident COPD after entry (1 = yes, 0 = no)",
    "Date of first COPD diagnosis after entry",
    "Asthma at or before entry (1 = yes, 0 = no)",
    "Diabetes at or before entry (1 = yes, 0 = no)",
    "Hypertension at or before entry (1 = yes, 0 = no)",
    "Start date of residential exposure period",
    "End date of residential exposure period",
    "State of residence",
    "County of residence",
    "Total years of residential coverage",
    "Coverage status (sufficient/insufficient)"
  ),
  Type = c(
    "Integer","Date","Numeric","Categorical","Numeric","Categorical",
    "Categorical","Date","Binary","Date","Binary","Binary","Binary",
    "Date","Date","Categorical","Categorical","Numeric","Categorical"
  )
)

kable(data_dict, caption = "Data Dictionary")

```
